name: braindrain-cc
description: Context window usage meter for Claude Code — always visible in your status bar

braindrain-cc.pollInterval.description: How often to check for context updates (in seconds)

braindrain-cc.warningThreshold.description: Percentage at which the indicator turns yellow

braindrain-cc.dangerThreshold.description: Percentage at which the indicator turns red

braindrain-cc.systemOverhead.description: Estimated system token overhead (system prompt, tools, MCP, CLAUDE.md). These tokens are invisible to the statusline but consume context. Increase if BrainDrain underreports compared to Claude Code's 'Context low' warning.
